metadata.description: MSTED annotation for ITS collision scene

scene_description: An urban arterial intersection filmed from an overhead traffic camera on a clear day. Light-to-moderate traffic in both directions. A two-way, four-lane road with marked crosswalks and overhead signal lights.

temporal_spatial_localization.description: Vehicles travel through the intersection uneventfully. A gray sedan is visible in the center lane heading northbound.
The gray sedan begins a left turn maneuver and collides with a white sedan traveling straight in the opposite direction.

event_description.description: A left-turn collision between a gray sedan and an oncoming white sedan at an unsignalized turn.
event_description.temporal_description: The collision occurs between 00:05 and 00:09.50, with impact at approximately 00:06.
event_description.cause: The gray sedan initiated a left turn without yielding to oncoming traffic.
event_description.consequence: Both vehicles sustained damage. The white sedan was displaced onto the sidewalk.
